meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Dreambeans by Google Labs
products.tagline: Daily AI stories personalised from your Google apps
products.summaryZh: 每日AI资讯，根据你的Google应用个性化推荐
products.descriptionZh: Dreambeans 会在夜间整合你的 Gmail、日历、照片、YouTube 和搜索记录，生成每日 AI 故事集。面向希望主动获取个人背景信息的 Google AI Ultra 订阅用户。
products.description: Dreambeans synthesises your Gmail, Calendar, Photos, YouTube, and Search overnight to deliver daily AI-generated story collections. For Google AI Ultra subscribers who want personal context surfaced proactively.

products.name: Wave
products.tagline: Turn your voice into text — local or cloud, your choice
products.summaryZh: 将你的语音转为文字——本地或云端，任你选择
products.descriptionZh: Wave 让你在 macOS 上只需语音即可在任何位置调用 AI 模型。按住快捷键，说话，然后松开——你的语音会被转录、处理，结果会精确出现在你需要的地方。如果你在打字，它会替换或插入文本；如果你在阅读，它会显示一个浮动答案。支持所有应用，并能以选中文本作为上下文。
products.description: Wave lets you invoke an AI model anywhere on macOS using just your voice. Hold a hotkey, speak, and release—your speech is transcribed, processed, and the result appears exactly where you need it. If you're typing, it replaces or inserts text. If you're reading, it shows a floating answer. Works across all apps with selected text as context.

products.name: Job Postings API
products.tagline: View, monitor, and analyze 1.8M+ US jobs
products.summaryZh: 查看、监控和分析180万+美国职位
products.descriptionZh: 一个免费托管的职位列表API，涵盖6万多家公司的180万+职位信息。获取来自30多个申请人追踪系统的全面活跃及历史职位数据，覆盖各行业及各发展阶段的企业。
products.description: A free, hosted job listings API with 1.8M+ listings across 60k companies. Get comprehensive active and historical job data from 30+ applicant tracking systems, with companies spanning industries and stages.

products.name: Smmall Cloud for iOS
products.tagline: Simple file sharing on your iPad or iPhone
products.summaryZh: 在iPad或iPhone上轻松共享文件
products.descriptionZh: Smmall Cloud 是一款专注、可自定义的文件分享应用，正是你一直缺少的工具。从 iPhone 或 iPad 上传照片、视频、文档等文件，然后通过简洁链接、二维码或自定义短链接进行分享。将文件整理到有序文件夹中，通过文件收件箱收集任何人上传的内容，并在每次分享中突出展示你自己的品牌。没有杂乱，没有企业版，没有销售团队——只有恰到好处的分享体验。
products.description: Smmall Cloud is the focused, customizable file-sharing app you've been missing. Upload photos, videos, docs, and more from your iPhone or iPad, then share them with a clean link, a QR code, or a custom short URL. Organize files into ordered folders, collect uploads from anyone through your File Inbox, and put your own brand front and center on every share. No clutter, no enterprise tier, no sales team — just sharing done right.

products.name: Alfa
products.tagline: You build the product. We bring the traffic.
products.summaryZh: 你负责打造产品，我们负责带来流量。
products.descriptionZh: Alfa帮助SaaS团队将关键词研究转化为适配GEO的文章。它分析SERP、搜索意图和竞争对手缺口，然后生成经过事实核查、可直接用于CMS的内容，适配Google、AI Overviews、ChatGPT和Perplexity。适合希望在不组建完整内容团队的情况下获得复合有机流量的创始人和精益增长团队。
products.description: Alfa helps SaaS teams turn keyword research into GEO-ready articles. It analyzes SERPs, search intent, and competitor gaps, then creates fact-checked, CMS-ready content built for Google, AI Overviews, ChatGPT, and Perplexity. Perfect for founders and lean growth teams who want compounding organic traffic without hiring a full content team.

products.name: EmailBuilder.in
products.tagline: Free no-code HTML email builder with unlimited exports
products.summaryZh: 免费的无代码HTML邮件编辑器，支持无限导出
products.descriptionZh: EmailBuilder.in 是一款免费的视觉化HTML邮件构建工具，支持无限次导出。通过简单的拖拽模块创建可直接投入使用的HTML邮件，自定义布局与样式，预览响应式效果，并导出包含资源的干净HTML代码。可将项目保存为JSON格式，随时重新打开并继续编辑。
products.description: EmailBuilder.in is a free visual HTML email builder with unlimited exports. Create production-ready HTML emails using simple drag-and-drop blocks, customize layouts and styles, preview responsiveness, and export clean HTML with assets. Save projects as JSON to reopen and continue editing anytime.

products.name: Wekraft
products.tagline: your project lives in Github , so should your workspace.
products.summaryZh: 你的项目在Github上，你的工作空间也应如此。
products.descriptionZh: 面向现代软件团队的AI优先工作空间 Wekraft是一款为初创企业和快速迭代的工程团队打造的AI驱动项目管理平台。与传统的项目管理工具不同，Wekraft直接与GitHub连接，将提交、拉取请求和代码活动转化为可操作的项目情报。Wekraft通过一个由AI驱动的简单协作工作空间，帮助团队管理复杂项目。
products.description: The AI-First Workspace for Modern Software Teams Wekraft is an AI-powered project management platform built for startups and fast-moving engineering teamsUnlike traditional project management tools, Wekraft stays directly connected to GitHub, turning commits, pull requests, and code activity into actionable project intelligence. Wekraft helps teams manage complex projects through a simple, collaborative workspace powered by AI.

products.name: Redirectly
products.tagline: Know which campaigns actually drive your installs
products.summaryZh: 了解哪些营销活动真正推动了你的安装量
products.descriptionZh: 查看哪些推广活动带来了安装量。Redirectly 为移动应用提供深度链接与安装归因服务——可按推广活动、渠道、设备和国家追踪点击、安装及转化数据。只需集成一个 SDK。提供 14 天免费试用。
products.description: See which campaigns drive your installs. Redirectly is deep linking + install attribution for mobile apps — track clicks, installs, and conversion by campaign, channel, device, and country. Drop in one SDK. 14-day free trial.

products.name: FactGuard
products.tagline: Real-time AI fact-checking to fight fake news 🛡️
products.summaryZh: 实时AI事实核查，抵御虚假新闻 🛡️
products.descriptionZh: FactGuard 是一款专为打击虚假信息而设计的智能工具。它集成了实时谷歌搜索验证功能，可在2026年即时核实具有时效性的谣言与新闻。通过深度分析论证，提供精准的“已核实”或“虚假”判定结果。由一位15岁的独立开发者打造。🛡️🚀
products.description: A smart tool built to fight misinformation. FactGuard integrates live Google Search grounding to verify time-sensitive rumors and news instantly in 2026. Get a precise "Verified" or "Hoax" verdict with deep analytical arguments. Created by a 15-year-old solo dev. 🛡️🚀

products.name: Narrow
products.tagline: Super Inbox For Linkedin
products.summaryZh: LinkedIn 超级收件箱
products.descriptionZh: 使用标签、提醒、看板及AI筛选功能管理LinkedIn对话。及时跟进重点对话，聚焦关键沟通。
products.description: Organise LinkedIn conversations with labels, reminders, Kanban boards, and AI-powered screening. Stay on top of follow-ups and focus on the conversations that matter.

products.name: NAADI
products.tagline: Corporation tax automated. So accountants advise, not admin
products.summaryZh: 企业所得税自动化。让会计师专注于咨询，而非行政事务。
products.descriptionZh: NAADI负责处理会计事务所全部客户的企业税情报工作。我们对交易进行分类整理，评估税务状况，标记减免项与风险点，让事务所客户实时掌握自身企业税情况。会计师专注于咨询建议，我们负责数据处理。
products.description: NAADI handles the corporation tax intelligence work across the entire client base of an accounting practice. We classify and sort transactions, estimate tax positions, flag reliefs and risks, giving clients of a practice real-time visibility into their corporation tax. Accountants focus on advisory, we take care of data entry.

products.name: Caddie
products.tagline: Notetaker that speaks and sells
products.summaryZh: 会说话、会推销的笔记工具
products.descriptionZh: Caddie 是首个真正加入通话、实时进行研究，并在你卡壳时主动发言的辅助工具。
products.description: Caddie is the first copilot that actually joins the call, does research in real-time, and also speaks when you get stuck.

products.name: Daisy
products.tagline: Record, transcribe, summarise — nothing leaves your Mac
products.summaryZh: 录制、转录、摘要——一切尽在Mac端完成
products.descriptionZh: 本地优先的Mac会议录音工具——完全开源（Apache 2.0）。无需机器人加入即可录制通话双方（麦克风+系统音频），通过Whisper在设备端完成转录，并支持使用你的AI（Anthropic、OpenAI、Apple Intelligence）生成摘要。提供本地MCP服务器，使Claude和Cursor可查询会议内容——同时可作为任意应用中的即按即说听写工具。无需云端、无需账户、无需订阅。
products.description: Local-first meeting recorder for Mac — and fully open source (Apache 2.0). Records both sides of a call (mic + system audio) with no bot joining, transcribes on-device with Whisper, and summarises with your AI (Anthropic, OpenAI, Apple Intelligence). Exposes a local MCP server so Claude & Cursor can query your meetings — and doubles as push-to-talk dictation in any app. No cloud, no account, no subscription.

products.name: WAR MODE
products.tagline: Turn habits into missions. Discipline over motivation.
products.summaryZh: 将习惯转化为使命。自律胜过动机。
products.descriptionZh: 高性能人士的日常操作系统。混乱生活中的精准工具。
products.description: A daily operating system for high-performance individuals. Precision tools for chaotic lives.

products.name: SeaVid AI
products.tagline: ai video generator
products.summaryZh: AI视频生成器
products.descriptionZh: Seavid AI 是一款免费的在线高级AI图像与视频生成器。可创建并编辑多镜头爆款视频，由Seedance 2.0驱动。
products.description: Seavid AI is a free, Advanced AI image & video generator online. Create & Edit viral multi‑shot videos，Powered by Seedance 2.0.

products.name: NixRank
products.tagline: Predicts market-moving news before it breaks.
products.summaryZh: 在市场动态新闻发布前预测其影响。
products.descriptionZh: 识别可能在重大市场事件公开前就受到影响的上市公司。NixRank通过分析上市公司的行为模式、历史先例和隐藏的结构性指标，揭示盈利意外、合作伙伴关系、收购及战略扩张的早期信号。它有助于在新闻周期之前发现潜在的企业发展动态。
products.description: Identify listed companies likely to experience major market-moving events before they are publicly announced. NixRank surfaces early signals of earnings surprises, partnerships, acquisitions, and strategic expansions by analyzing behavioral patterns, historical precedents, and hidden structural indicators across public companies. It helps detect potential corporate developments ahead of the news cycle.

products.name: Kanini
products.tagline: Local First Productivity & Creative Tools
products.summaryZh: 本地优先的生产力与创意工具
products.descriptionZh: 一套基于浏览器的私密工具集，包含15+专业级实用工具，全部在浏览器本地运行。面向学生与创作者。混合低保真音效、计算GPA、在图片中隐藏密文、让AI文本更自然——所有处理均在浏览器内完成。Kanini现已上线Product Hunt！无需账户、无需上传、无追踪。只为学生、创作者与开发者提供快速、简洁的工具。
products.description: A collection of private, browser-based 15+ pro‑grade utilities and tools all running 100% locally in your browser. for students and creators. Mix lofi sounds, calculate your GPA, hide secret messages in images, and humanize AI text all processed entirely in your browser. Kanini is live on Product Hunt! No accounts. No uploads. No tracking. Just fast, clean tools for students, creators, and makers.

products.name: CabinLink
products.tagline: Flight map from cabin Wi-Fi
products.summaryZh: 客舱Wi-Fi飞行地图
products.descriptionZh: CabinLink 可读取支持的机上 Wi-Fi 清单，并将其转换为原生飞行仪表盘。可查看航线、当前位置、海拔、速度、预计到达时间、飞机详情及目的地天气，当客舱连接中断时仍显示最新已知数据。无需登录、无广告，支持的清单也无需购买付费 Wi-Fi 通行证。将于 2026 年 6 月 7 日 MST 时间上午 9 点在 iPhone、iPad、Mac 和 Apple Vision Pro 上推出。
products.description: CabinLink reads supported in-flight Wi-Fi manifests and turns them into a native flight dashboard. See route, current position, altitude, speed, ETA, aircraft details, and destination weather, with last-known updates when the cabin connection drops. No login, no ads, and no paid Wi-Fi pass required for supported manifests. Launches Jun 7, 2026 at 9 AM MST on iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple Vision Pro.

products.name: Ticker Signals
products.tagline: 39 indicators. 2,500+ stocks. One consensus verdict.
products.summaryZh: 39个指标，2500余只股票，一个共识结论。
products.descriptionZh: 美国与印度股票免费技术评分引擎。TickerSignals每日对6个层面的39项指标进行运算，生成包含止损与持仓预估的透明加权共识结论，无需逐一核查指标。
products.description: A free technical scoring engine for US and Indian stocks. Instead of checking indicators one by one, TickerSignals runs 39 indicators across 6 layers daily to produce a transparent, weighted consensus verdict with stop loss and holding estimates.

products.name: Brisa — Your personal wealth OS
products.tagline: AI wealth advisor for the US and Canada
products.summaryZh: AI财富顾问（适用于美国和加拿大）
products.descriptionZh: Brisa 是一个面向美国和加拿大的 AI 优先财富管理平台。与昂贵的人工顾问或千篇一律的机器人顾问不同，Brisa 为您提供个性化的 AI，它能理解您的整体财务状况，用通俗语言解释其推理过程，并随着您生活的变化而调整。该平台由一位 AI/机器学习工程师打造，是真正个性化的财富管理，让那些从未有资格获得私人顾问的人也能使用。
products.description: Brisa is an AI-first wealth management platform built for the US and Canada. Instead of expensive human advisors or one-size-fits-all robo-advisors, Brisa gives you a personalized AI that understands your full financial picture, explains its reasoning in plain language, and adapts as your life changes. Built by an AI/ML engineer, it's wealth management that's actually personal, and accessible to people who'd never qualify for a private advisor.
